reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives:
A prominent hotel in a good location easy access to and from Cat Ba Do Son etc.Breakfasts excellent.
Mainly business travellers but cheaper than lower grade hotel I stayed at in Hanoi.
reviews.negatives: Unfortunately the swimming pool was undergoing maintenance and was unavailable but gym and spa/massage operating.

reviews.title: Terrible welcome and first room
reviews.text:
Positive - when I asked to leave they offered me an upgrade room which was excellent. 

Welcome  when I arrived there was no one to meet the car or show me in . I was not sure what to do or where to go-

Reception was ok although didn’t write room number or show me to lift so I was not sure what to do - had to ride life back to reception to ask for number

Bad smell
In reception area.

Tv wasn’t working  in first room I was told that there are some issues with the settings - they did try to fix but could not

Breakfast - jams and peanut butter were half empty - a horrid cheese selection - no salt or pepper on table , not shown to a place, waffles and pancakes cold and rubbery - I didn’t want to reheat as they were not fresh and they would not cook fresh for me 

Hotel cafe was shut

30 kids in the swimming pool so I could not swim 

If I had known all this I would never have paid the price or stayed here - 
I remained due to the upgrade
reviews.response:
Dear Mr.Gavin 
First of all, I would like to thank you for choosing Mercure Haiphong during your stay and sharing your experience. 
However, I am so sorry that it has failed your expectations and left the very bad impression on your first stay due to the reckless and unprofessional attitude of Hotel staffs. All of your feedbacks have been carefully noted within our internal teams and related departments who were in charge your booking. Our management board has carefully gone through every single issues popping up during your stay to make sure that such recurring problems would not happen again. 
Once again, my sincere apology for your bad experience during your stay. Hopefully we will have opportunity in the coming time to welcome you back with commitment in service excellence. 
Mai Anh (Ms) 
E-commerce Executive

reviews.title: Lovely hotel, great stuff, no problem they can’t solve!
reviews.positives: Great services, building facilities and staff. Lots of nice little 5 star touches.
reviews.negatives: Nothing really to complain about - had a couple minor plumbing and heating issues with the room but I just mentioned it to the front desk when I left to run an errand and everything is always addressed within 20 minutes, quite seemlesly. Also a little funny that on the first day I forgot to put a do not disturb sign on the door and someone knocked on my door to ask for laundry and to clean the room at 8:30am. Vietnamese people start their day earlier than the rest of the world it seems, so need to keep the do not disturb sign up if you would like to sleep in, past 9!

reviews.title: Nice rooms, great restaurant, helpful staff
reviews.text: I had a very pleasant stay at The Mercure. The room was spacious, clean, and comfortable. Staff were more than friendly and always helpful. The restaurant served a great lunch (I never tried the breakfast). After several months in Vietnam, it was a refreshing change to find a western menu with well prepared dishes, and a pretty good wine list. I will have no problem staying here again on my next visit to Haiphong.
reviews.response:

Thank you for rating for us on the website, and leaving good comments regarding to our quality service. I am also really glad to pass your comments to our service team especially to Housekeeping, Food and beverage department. We are appreciated for your reviews.

However, if there is anything that we can improve to make you feel better and more comfortable on your next stay, then just please let us know. It would be appreciated and helpful for our team.

We hope to see you again very soon and your next visit will be as pleasant as the previous one.

Yours Sincerely,

Guest Experience Manager

Should you return in the future, we would be more than happy to arrange a room that better suits your preferences to ensure a more comfortable stay.

We look forward to welcoming you back and hope to have the opportunity to serve you even better next time.

Mở cửa phòng ra là nhìn thẳng sang tòa chung cư đang xuống cấp, sảnh khách sạn cũng phải đi ngang qua sảnh chung cư... khiến tôi có cảm giác bất tiện, ko phải đang đi nghỉ ngơi.
reviews.response:
Kính gửi Quý khách,

Cảm ơn Quý khách đã dành thời gian chia sẻ trải nghiệm tại Mercure Hải Phòng và đánh giá cao dịch vụ cũng như sự tận tâm của đội ngũ nhân viên.  

Chúng tôi rất tiếc khi biết rằng yếu tố vị trí và thiết kế của khách sạn đã gây ra sự bất tiện trong cảm nhận của Quý khách. reviews.title: Enjoyable Stay
reviews.text:
The hotel has an excellent location. Coffee shops, minimarts, restaurants, banks are all within a few meters of the hotel and a short drive to the Ben Binh Pier. 

I had a room on a high floor overlooking the city. There are not a lot of skyscrapers in Hai Phong so the view is unobstructed. High level of security as you need a key to get to your floor. Good soundproofing. I didn't hear traffic or my neighbors. Comfortable bed and pillows. 

Housekeeping and staff were responsive. Water is in glass bottles which is great for the environment. They have washcloths which is not routinely provided in South East Asia. 

Mercure hotels have a high customer service standard but at this location the staff were phenomenal from the doorman, front desk to housekeeping. 

I was taken care of very well at this hotel and will definitely visit again when in the area.

reviews.title: I wouldn’t recommend
reviews.text: I booked a room in Mercury in April of 2025. Even though it was summer, the room was quite chill. As it got too cold, I tried to turn off the air conditioning, but the controller wasn’t working properly. The cleaning crew started to clean pretty early in the morning (7 a.m). Even though I already put the „do not disturb“ sign out. The staff still insisted an knocking and ringing the bell. As i answered the door, the staff were polite and asked if we needed our room cleaned, but I refused, because we were still sleeping. As we left in the afternoon the staff came and cleaned our room. When we came back I was shocked to discover that, our clothes were touched and relocated. I stayed in many hotels in Vietnam and I never experienced someone moving my clean clothes and underwear somewhere else. I was not expecting a 5 Star hotel to touch my personal belongings. On top of that the ceiling in the bathroom was leaking what I hoped was water. I must say I was disappointed by the quality of this Hotel.

reviews.title: 最悪の思い出
reviews.text:
午後の4時、チェックインしに行ったら、パスポートのコピーでは泊まれませんと、まさかの宿泊拒否。テンポラリーカードかビザをプラスアルファーで提示しろと。
旦那のみ原本を提示したけど、家族全員分のテンポラリーカードが必要とのこと。
ホテル規約のどこにもそんな記載もない。
全然融通聞いてくれず、小さい子供2人抱えて５時に追い出される。

急遽泊まったホテルでも、コピーでOK、他のホテルでも言われたことないし、同じアコーグループに前日泊まった際はコピーでOKだった。
しかもまだ返金すらされてない。。。

絶対にお薦めしない。
同じ料金で100倍いいホテルがいっぱいあるので、後悔したくなかったら本当にこのホテルに泊まるのやめた方がいい。
reviews.response:
Dear Mr. Sakata Hiroyuki,

Thank you for your review. We understand your frustration and sincerely apologize for the inconvenience caused.

As per Vietnamese law (Consolidated Document No. 30/VBHN-VPQH, Article 33), all foreign guests are required to present a valid passport and visa (or copies) upon check-in. This regulation applies nationwide and is not specific to our hotel.

While procedures may vary between hotels, we take a conservative approach to ensure guest safety and fulfill our legal responsibilities. In this case, although the booking was prepaid for two rooms, we only charged one room as a gesture of goodwill.

We have also sent you an email with further details and a link to the official regulation for your reference. We hope for your kind understanding and regret that this experience did not meet your expectations.

Warm regards,
Linh Chi (Candy)
Quality Assurance Manager

reviews.title: ひどいホテル
reviews.text:
チェックインの際、朝食付きだと聞いていたし、また、朝食会場に入る時も大丈夫か確認してOKだと言うので食べ始めたら伝票を持って現れ、有料だからとサインさせられた。(もし同意しなくてもチェックイン時にデポジットとしてクレジットをスキャンしているので絶対拒めない。)
また、部屋の冷蔵庫も壊れて使えなかったし、wi-fiも遅くてブチブチ切れた。これで朝食代込みで約12,000円は納得出来ない。100mくらい南にあるナムクオンホテルは朝食付きで6,000円以下。清潔で静かで遥かに良かった。
※ちなみにハイフォン人で、こんな日本語が書ける人はまずいません。メルキュールの評判を下げるためのデマではなく、私の話は全部実話です。

reviews.response:
Dear Mr. Kim,
We are sorry for your incomplete experience when coming to Mercure Hai Phong. The deposit is only a guarantee for expenses other than the room fee during the stay. This is not a payment, does not affect your account balance, but is only frozen in your account so that it can be used as payment when you check out if there are services arising on the invoice. If no service occurs, this deposit is 100% refunded. At Mercure Hai Phong and other hotels, this deposit is required during check-in. We are sorry for the misunderstandings in communication that caused you to lack information, and are grateful to you for your candid comments, which help us improve our services. We will retrain staff to be able to explain more accurately and clearly to customers in the future.
Your booking has been notified by the hotel to be canceled for free by the OTA, there is no fee. If you lose the fee, you can notify the OTA to contact the hotel so we can have a plan to support you.
Best regards,
